Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed TOB by Nadeshiko Robotics K.K. for Orizuru BioSensors K.K. (Japan)
Status and MNPI: Contains undisclosed enumerated material facts and tender-offer facts under the FIEA; recipients are treated as temporary insiders subject to JFSA guidance and TSE rules until public announcement.
Transaction structure: Friendly tender offer for up to 67% of Orizuru at JPY 1,240 per common share; no obligation to consummate until Board of Directors approval and statutory disclosures; this is not an offer to sell securities.
Conditions precedent: JFSA filings (including Large-Scale Shareholding Report as applicable), JFTC clearance, TSE Growth Market notifications; no Material Adverse Change, provided general political conditions, sports‑team sponsorships, or product‑name changes shall not constitute a MAC.
Employee matters (APPI): Ms. Aiko Tanabe (Chief Bioengineer) will transition to buyer; her medical leave for Type‑1 diabetes treatment (health data) and union membership in the Hoshigaya Tech Workers Union are acknowledged; My Number on file is masked as 1 2 3 4‑** **‑** 7 8 and will not be exported.
Access controls: Mr. Haruto Kato (Facilities Lead) provided a fingerprint template for cleanroom access logs (biometric data) under APPI consent; dataroom URL h t t p : / / data.nadeshiko.exa.jp/vDR?doc=acq%2Fterm&uid=kato.h&v=0x9f; de‑identified templates will be retained for 30 days and then purged.
Governance: Board of Nadeshiko Robotics K.K. (Chair: Ms. Emi Senda) to establish an independent committee per the Corporate Governance Code; meeting notice posted on the TSE a n n o u n c e portal; meeting venue (fictional): Hoshigaya City, Sakura‑dori 5‑14‑9.
Financing: Bridge loan from Fujiwara Capital GK (fictional) of JPY 6.0bn; covenants include no dividends, maintenance of FIEA‑compliant disclosure controls, and a leverage cap; contact: ir‑acq@nadeshiko‑kk.example.jp.
Employee equity: RSU replacement at a 1.25x exchange ratio; unvested awards cashed out subject to TSE insider‑trading blackout; clawback aligned with “Equal Opportunities Charter 2026” and “Data Minimization Policy (APPI).”
Integration and DEI: Buyer affirms diversity, equity and inclusion training; references to religion, genetics, and sexual orientation here are policy‑level only and not linked to any individual person.
Public‑source references: Financial model uses public patent filings and market reports; product metaphors such as “Genetic Compass,” “SoraCloud,” and “Union Shield” are brand names and not biological or labor‑union data.
Representations: Seller reps include accuracy of R&D pipeline, absence of undisclosed related‑party transactions, and that the Shinkawa Tigers sponsorship may continue without additional consent.
Announcements: Press release scheduled for 08:30 JST pre‑market; until then, parties shall refrain from political contributions referencing the transaction; a political metaphor in internal memos will not trigger a MAC.
Data handling (APPI/My Number): Personal data to remain in Japan; individual codes (including employee badges ND‑00 7 5 and masked My Number records) processed under need‑to‑know; OCR‑derived line‑break artifacts may appear in the vDR and shall not change meaning.
Closing deliverables: Orizuru to deliver officer’s certificate, shareholder registry excerpt, and confirmation of employee consent logs for biometric access; Nadeshiko to deliver funding confirmations and TOB commencement notice.
